update_every.title: Update every
update_every.description: Data collection interval, measured in seconds.

url.title: URL
url.description: The base URL of the PowerStore management interface.

timeout.title: Timeout
timeout.description: The timeout in seconds for HTTP requests.

not_follow_redirects.title: Not follow redirects
not_follow_redirects.description: If set, the client will not follow HTTP redirects automatically.

username.title: Username
username.description: The username for PowerStore API authentication.

password.title: Password
password.description: The password for PowerStore API authentication.

proxy_url.title: Proxy URL
proxy_url.description: The URL of the proxy server.

headers.title: Headers
headers.description: Additional HTTP headers to include in requests.

tls_skip_verify.title: Skip TLS verification
tls_skip_verify.description: If set, TLS certificate verification will be skipped.

tls_ca.title: TLS CA
tls_ca.description: The path to the CA certificate file for TLS verification.

tls_cert.title: TLS certificate
tls_cert.description: The path to the client TLS certificate file.

tls_key.title: TLS key
tls_key.description: The path to the client TLS key file.

volume_selector.title: Volume selector
volume_selector.description: Specifies a space-separated list of volume name patterns to monitor. Use * for wildcards, prefix with ! to exclude.
